name: 5-Amino-1MQ
description: Studied as an NNMT inhibitor in cell-based assays of metabolic enzyme activity and cellular energy metabolism. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: AOD-9604
description: Growth hormone fragment studied in adipocyte lipid-handling and receptor-selectivity assays. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: ARA-290
description: Investigational peptide studied in neuronal cell-line signaling, inflammatory marker modulation, and extracellular matrix research models. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: BPC-157
description: Widely studied peptide in connective tissue, tendon, ligament, musculoskeletal, and gastrointestinal cell-line models. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: BPC-157 / TB-500
description: Multi-peptide blend commonly evaluated in soft-tissue extracellular matrix and fibroblast migration assays. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: Cagrilintide
description: Amylin analogue studied in satiety-pathway and metabolic receptor signaling assays. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: CJC-1295 w/ DAC
description: Long-acting GHRH analogue used in pituitary cell-line and somatotropic receptor kinetics studies. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: CJC-1295 w/o DAC
description: Short-acting GHRH analogue frequently co-studied with selective secretagogues in receptor-binding assays. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: CJC / Ipamorelin
description: Commonly co-studied GHRH and GH secretagogue blend for pituitary cell-line receptor occupancy and signaling assays. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: DSIP
description: Peptide studied in neuronal cultures for sleep-regulatory signaling and circadian pathway research. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: Epithalon
description: Tetrapeptide studied in senescence-associated pathway and telomere-related cell culture models. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: GHK-Cu
description: Copper peptide investigated in dermal fibroblast, keratinocyte, and extracellular matrix synthesis assays. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: GLOW Blend
description: Multi-peptide research blend (BPC-157, TB-500, GHK-Cu) for dermal ECM and fibroblast co-culture assays. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: KLOW Blend
description: Multi-peptide research blend combining GHK-Cu, KPV, BPC-157, and TB-500 for connective tissue and inflammatory marker assays. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: Ipamorelin
description: Selective GH secretagogue studied in pituitary cell-line receptor binding and downstream signaling assays. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: MOTS-C
description: Mitochondrial-derived peptide studied in myocyte and mitochondrial function assays under controlled culture conditions. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: NAD+
description: Coenzyme substrate used in cellular energy metabolism and redox biochemistry research protocols. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: Retatrutide
description: Triple receptor agonist studied in cell-based models of incretin and metabolic receptor pharmacology. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: Semaglutide
description: GLP-1 receptor agonist studied in cell-based models of incretin signaling and metabolic receptor pharmacology. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: TB-500 (Thymosin β4)
description: Synthetic peptide studied in cytoskeletal motility and extracellular matrix remodeling cell culture models. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.

name: Tirzepatide
description: Dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor agonist studied in cell-based models of incretin signaling and metabolic receptor pharmacology. For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human or veterinary use.
